mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT @ROWNUM := @ROWNUM + 1 AS COUNT , AA.* FROM ( SELECT CAST(RIGHT(PM_KEYNO,10) AS UNSIGNED) PM_KEYNO , P.PM_NAME , P.PM_NAME_EN , P.PM_SEAT , CASE PM_USE WHEN 'Y' THEN 'O' WHEN 'N' THEN 'X' END PM_USE , CASE PM_SEATPLAN_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN 'O' WHEN 'N' THEN 'X' END PM_SEATPLAN_YN , FS.* , CONCAT(FS_FOLDER,FS_CHANGENM, '.',FS_EXT) THUMBNAIL_PATH , FS_PUBLIC_PATH THUMBNAIL_PUBLIC_PATH FROM t_place_manager P LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE PM_USE != 'D' ORDER BY PM_KEYNO ) AA WHERE (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 ) BB WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_NAME_EN LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_SEAT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_USE = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND PM_SEATPLAN_YN = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_NAME_EN LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_SEAT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_USE = #{item.searchKeyword} OR PM_SEATPLAN_YN = #{item.searchKeyword} )
mapper.select: SELECT @ROWNUM := @ROWNUM + 1 AS NUMBER , AA.* FROM ( SELECT P.* , FS.* FROM t_place_manager P LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE PM_USE = 'Y' ORDER BY PM_KEYNO ) AA, (SELECT @ROWNUM := 0 ) R ORDER BY PM_KEYNO DESC

SELECT AA.*, GROUP_CONCAT(CODES ORDER BY PSS_ROW ASC SEPARATOR '|') DATA FROM ( SELECT A.*, GROUP_CONCAT(PSS_CODE ORDER BY PSS_COL ASC) CODES FROM ( SELECT * FROM t_place_seatgroup_main M LEFT JOIN t_place_seatgroup_sub S ON M.PSM_KEYNO = S.PSS_PSM_KEYNO WHERE PSM_PM_KEYNO = #{PM_KEYNO} ORDER BY PSM_KEYNO,PSS_ROW,PSS_COL ) A GROUP BY PSM_KEYNO,PSS_ROW ) AA GROUP BY PSM_KEYNO
